content:
What is the income goal that you are 100% COMMITTED to achieving WITHIN the next 12 months?
I know i said $100,000k a year but I know if i really lock in, I know i am able to make more than that.

Who, other than you is going to benefit from your Success?
My family. It will benefit my whole family. Especially my momma because she has gone through so much for me just to be where i am today. I want to give back what she has given me for 21 years. I know this will totally help out with my misses and my baby boy. I want to be able to give back and provide for the people i love and care about.

What is your monthly marketing budget?
$100 - $199

What is your Business Start-Up Capital?
Less than $1000

What is your Credit Score?
667

If we were having this conversation 3 years from today, what has to have happened in your life both personally and professionally for you to be happy with your progress?
I would be happy with not living paycheck after paycheck and not living life on a thread anymore. With all these bills piling up and etc i just want them all to go away because i need to be the man and provide for my family. The more opportunities i have, the more i know that eventually i will succeed.
context: From document: Post Call Info Jose — chunk 3 (chunk 3/3)
